summary: Iteration 153: NLYT QA Recette Lot 2 - Blocs C (Creation/Modification RDV), E (Presences/Feuilles declaratives), J (Calendrier/Sync). Backend: 15/17 tests passed (1 xfail bug, 1 skipped). Frontend: All pages load correctly. One BUG detected: C2 empty title validation missing.

minor.issue: C2 BUG: Empty title is accepted (returns 200). Should reject with 400/422 for empty title validation.

passed_tests.C1_create_appointment_complete: PASS - RDV created with status=active, organizer_participant_id returned
passed_tests.C3_create_appointment_past_date: PASS - Past date correctly rejected with 400 'Impossible de créer un rendez-vous dans le passé'
passed_tests.C6_cancel_future_active_appointment: PASS - Future active appointment cancelled successfully, status updated to 'cancelled'
passed_tests.C7_cancel_started_appointment: PASS - Started appointment cannot be cancelled, returns 400 'Ce rendez-vous a déjà commencé'
passed_tests.C9_double_creation_no_crash: PASS - Two identical POST requests create 2 separate appointments (no idempotence, no crash)
passed_tests.C_DETAIL_get_appointment_detail: PASS - Detail endpoint returns all required fields (appointment_id, title, status, start_datetime, duration_minutes)
passed_tests.C_LIST_my_timeline: PASS - Timeline returns upcoming, past, action_required buckets with counts
passed_tests.E_API1_pending_sheets_structure: PASS - Pending sheets endpoint returns correct structure with context fields
passed_tests.E_API2_submit_sheet_nonexistent: PASS - Nonexistent appointment correctly rejected with 400
passed_tests.E_API4_sheet_for_cancelled_appointment: PASS - Submission for cancelled appointment correctly rejected
passed_tests.J_API2_auto_sync_settings: PASS - Auto-sync settings returned with correct structure
passed_tests.J_API3_disconnect_nonexistent: PASS - Disconnect endpoints respond correctly (404 for non-existent)
passed_tests.J_ROBUSTESSE_expired_token_handling: PASS - No crashes with expired/missing tokens

failed_tests.C2_create_appointment_missing_title: XFAIL (BUG) - Empty title is accepted instead of being rejected

skipped_tests.E_API3_double_submission: SKIPPED - No pending sheets available to test double submission

frontend_tests.dashboard: PASS - Dashboard loads with 41 upcoming engagements, calendar connections visible
frontend_tests.presences_page: PASS - Presences page loads with attendance sheets grouped by RDV with context (date, location, type)
frontend_tests.settings_page: PASS - Settings page loads with all sections (Profil, Workspace, Integrations, Paiement, Wallet, Statistiques)
frontend_tests.integrations_page: PASS - Integrations page shows Google Calendar and Outlook connections with status

action_items: FIX C2: Add validation to reject empty title in POST /api/appointments (currently accepts empty string)
critical_code_review_comments: appointments.py: Missing title validation - empty string '' is accepted as valid title
appointments.py: penalty_amount validation requires >= 1, which is correct but should be documented
declarative_routes.py: Correctly rejects submissions for cancelled appointments
calendar_routes.py: Properly handles expired tokens without crashing
seed_data_creation: Multiple test appointments created during testing (TEST_C1, TEST_C6, TEST_C8, TEST_C9 prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lot 2 (Blocs C, E, J) tested. One minor bug found: empty title validation missing in appointment creation. All other tests pass. Calendar connections (Google/Outlook) are working. Presences page shows attendance sheets correctly. Previous Lot 1 (iteration 152) had H6 double payout bug which was marked as critical.

mocked_apis.calendar_oauth: Google/Outlook OAuth tokens are real but may be expired

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The AppointmentCreate Pydantic model does not have a min_length validator on the title field, allowing empty strings to pass validation
reproduction_steps: 3. Appointment is created with empty title
rca_of_the_issue.recommended_fix: Add min_length=1 validator to title field in AppointmentCreate schema in /app/backend/models/schemas.py
